c.d: Allows users to rate movies and write reviews to share their personal opinions and influence recommendations
Algorithms or community matching to suggest movies based on user taste or similar users’ preferences
Ability to follow friends, comment on reviews, and get recommendations within a user community
Support for mobile platforms (iOS, Android) and web access
Filters to customize recommendations by genre, duration, date, and group recommendation capabilities
Number of active users and level of engagement (reviews, comments, ratings)
